title: Chloe Pei-Hsin Huang’s Research Blog
text: I am a 1st year PhD student in Psychology at Durham University. My research focuses on relationships, masking and wellbeing in autistic adults.

title: Chloe Pei-Hsin Huang’s Research Blog
text:
This website
This site is a space where I:

document my learning in R and Bayesian statistics
publish academic blogs
